PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 10:05 a.m., that there is no appearance by counsel and no one present to object. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)
